_publications._publicationTitle: In vivo functional analysis of the human NF2 tumor suppressor gene in Drosophila.

_contextSnippet: expression of a transgene expressing NF2Iso1 using the ubiquitously expressed T80 Gal4 driver substantially rescued the lethality of the null Mer4 allele, while NF2Iso2 provided very poor rescue
details: NF2 Iso1 provided 59±7% rescue at 1 dose and 72% rescue at 2 doses; NF2 Iso2 provided 8±4% rescue at 1 dose and 0% rescue at 2 doses
